scenes.name: 出镜开场
scenes.motion_prompt: The artisan stands still, slightly turns his head toward the camera, warm light shifts subtly, camera slowly pushes in
scenes.narration: 他，便是这门古老技艺的传承人，数十年如一日，守护着掐丝珐琅的火与色。

scenes.name: 设计画稿
scenes.motion_prompt: Subtle slow pan across the desk surface, soft light shifts across the rice paper
scenes.narration: 一张宣纸，几笔墨痕，是作品的灵魂起点。

scenes.name: 制胎
scenes.motion_prompt: The artisan raises the hammer and strikes the copper blank, hammer falls, then raises again, repeating rhythmically
scenes.narration: 匠人将紫铜片锤打成器形，作品的骨架便由此铸就。

scenes.name: 掐丝
scenes.motion_prompt: The artisan hand carefully bends the copper wire with tweezers, slowly shaping it into a curved pattern
scenes.narration: 细如发丝的扁铜丝，在指尖弯折成画的经脉。

scenes.name: 点蓝
scenes.motion_prompt: A small spoon carefully drops blue enamel powder into a wire compartment, then moves to the next section
scenes.narration: 矿物釉料被一一填入丝间，恰如点染丹青。

scenes.name: 烧制
scenes.motion_prompt: Subtle flickering glow from the kiln mouth, embers shift slightly, warm light pulses on nearby copper blanks
scenes.narration: 入窑七百度的锤炼，釉与丝相融相生。

scenes.name: 磨光
scenes.motion_prompt: The artisan rubs the sandstone across the cloisonne surface in slow circular motions, reflections shift on the polished copper
scenes.narration: 砂石一遍遍地打磨，器面方能光可鉴人。

scenes.name: 成品展示
scenes.motion_prompt: Camera slowly orbits the cloisonne piece, light glides across the golden wires and enamel surface, artisan hands stay still supporting it
scenes.narration: 镀金之后，丝如金线，釉如宝石。掐丝珐琅，至此方成大器。
